answer:
<think> I need to identify a Scottish nobleman who is a pioneering aviator and the father of James Alexander Douglas-Hamilton, Baron Selkirk of Douglas. I know that James Alexander Douglas-Hamilton, Baron Selkirk of Douglas, is a British politician and a member of the House of Lords. I also know that he is the son of Archibald Douglas-Hamilton, 15th Duke of Hamilton. I recall that Archibald Douglas-Hamilton, 15th Duke of Hamilton, was a Scottish nobleman and a pioneering aviator, known for his contributions to the development of aviation in the early 20th century. Therefore, I can conclude that the Scottish nobleman and pioneering aviator who is the father of James Alexander Douglas-Hamilton, Baron Selkirk of Douglas, is Archibald Douglas-Hamilton, 15th Duke of Hamilton. </think>
<answer> Archibald Douglas-Hamilton, 15th Duke of Hamilton </answer>
